case_title: DELORIS LOGAN VS. BUY SELL LOAN,INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOGAN, DELORIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BUY SELL LOAN,INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
